Request a Demo
SAM4

Fleet condition monitoring from the electrical cabinet

One platform for every AC motor. SAM4 captures electrical signatures at the motor control cabinet, detects developing faults with AI, validates every alert with a reliability engineer, and delivers actionable diagnostics to your maintenance team.

10,000+
Assets monitored
90.8%
Detection rate
0.32%
False communication rate
80+
Customers worldwide
Request a Demo

From electrical signal to maintenance action

Five stages. One continuous pipeline. Every motor monitored 24/7.

01
Signal capture
CT/VT clamps at the MCC sample current and voltage waveforms continuously.
02
Edge processing
On-site DAQ compresses and quality-checks raw data before transmission.
03
AI detection
Cloud models compare spectral features against learned baselines and known fault patterns.
04
Engineer validation
A Samotics reliability engineer reviews every alert before it reaches your team.
05
Maintenance action
Validated diagnostics delivered via dashboard, CMMS work order, or API.
What SAM4 monitors

Four capabilities. One managed service.

Asset health monitoring

Continuous condition assessment across your full motor fleet. Each asset scored against its own baseline. Trends tracked automatically.

Anomaly detection

AI models flag deviations from normal behaviour. Bearing damage, misalignment, imbalance, cavitation, stator faults. Detected weeks to months before failure.

Fleet management

Single dashboard across sites, regions, asset classes. Fleet-level analytics show where risk concentrates. Multi-site rollouts from one platform.

Energy monitoring

Per-motor power consumption tracked continuously. Identify efficiency losses, abnormal consumption patterns, and load changes. No additional hardware.

Alert validation

Every alert reviewed before it reaches your team

AI flags the anomaly. A human confirms it. This is why SAM4 has a 0.32% false communication rate across 1,874 resolved incidents.

AI flags anomaly

Detection engine identifies statistically significant deviation from baseline. Preliminary classification with confidence score.

Engineer reviews

Reliability engineer examines spectral data, reviews operating context, confirms or refines classification.

Severity assessed

Watch, Warning, or Critical. Based on deviation magnitude, trend velocity, and fault-specific degradation models.

Action recommended

Specific maintenance recommendation written. Not "check the pump." Instead: "Inner race bearing defect, plan replacement within 4 weeks."

Work order created

Validated diagnostic published to dashboard and pushed to CMMS as a work order. Full evidence package attached.

Why human-in-the-loop?

Fully automated systems generate alert fatigue. Teams stop trusting them. SAM4's hybrid approach means every alert carries engineer judgement. That is why customers act on them.

What your team receives

Anatomy of a SAM4 alert

Every validated finding includes the information your maintenance team needs to act. No ambiguity.

Every alert includes:

  • Fault classification with confidence level
  • Severity rating: Watch, Warning, or Critical
  • First detection date and trend direction
  • Specific maintenance recommendation
  • Spectral evidence and trend history
  • Operating context and load conditions
  • Link to full diagnostic detail in dashboard
System integration

From detection to maintenance action

SAM4 alerts reach your maintenance team where they already work. CMMS work orders, data exports, API access.

SAP PM IBM Maximo Infor EAM REST API

CMMS work orders

Validated findings pushed directly into SAP PM, Maximo, or Infor EAM as structured work orders. No manual re-entry. Asset ID, fault type, severity, and recommended action mapped to your fields.

REST API

Pull asset health data, alert history, and trend metrics into custom dashboards or data platforms. Standard REST endpoints with token authentication.

Data export

Monthly fleet health reports. Quarterly business reviews mapping findings to outcomes: confirmed saves, avoided downtime, efficiency gains.

Enterprise scale

Built for multi-site, multi-team operations

Multi-site management

One platform across all locations. Compare asset health by site, region, or asset class. Roll out at one facility and scale across the fleet.

Role-based access

Site engineers see their assets. Regional managers see fleet summaries. Executives see business outcomes. Configurable per role.

Dedicated service team

Named customer success manager. Diagnostic support from reliability engineers. Quarterly business reviews tracking detection value.

Deployment flexibility

Start with a 5-asset pilot. Scale to 10,000+. Same platform, same process, same service model at every scale.

"SAM4 delivers clear and actionable insights that enable our teams to make swift, informed decisions."
Yorkshire Water
"At first I was a bit sceptical about SAM4's ability to detect failures by analysing electrical waveforms, but the results speak for themselves: it just works."
DuPont
